description: Screenshot-evidence skill created without version history — skill modifying evidence system needs its own evidence trail
what_prevented_failure: Jordan flagged it explicitly before execution started
action_taken: Will move skill to tracked repo with git history

description: Status report incorrectly listed commit 5cc3ecf as containing Task 1.4 — it only contained camera-config.json
root_cause: Manual status report without verifying commit contents
prevention: Always run git show --stat before reporting commit contents

description: Playwright installed without running dependency gate first — the gate script existed but wasn't used for this install
what_prevented_failure: Package was well-known (Playwright, millions of downloads), but process was skipped
action_taken: Dependency gate now enforced for all future installs

description: Phase 3 Tier A/B scoring was built but explicitly noted as 'needs verification' — good, but could have been grandfathered in if timeline compressed
what_prevented_failure: Jordan explicitly required verification before proceeding
action_taken: Verification gate run against Phase 3 output before continuing

description: Skill Graveyard contained fabricated entry (neon-glow-outline-cozy) — a template example presented as a real retired skill with fake trial evidence
what_prevented_failure: Jordan caught it: no skill has reached promoted status, so none could have been retired. Count math did not include it.
action_taken: Removed fabricated entry, graveyard now empty until real retirement occurs
